channel.title: NostraDavid's Projects on Thaumatorium
channel.description: Recent content in NostraDavid's Projects on Thaumatorium

item.title: Inventing on Principle Notebook
item.description:
Live visual notebook

A code-and-canvas notebook in the spirit of Bret Victor: the scene redraws live while you type, numeric literals show a slider on hover, hex colors pop a picker on hover, and Ctrl turns the notebook into an inspector that links code lines to visible shapes.

Hover a number for a slider Hover a hex color for a picker Ctrl inspect code to visual output Hover the preview to spotlight its source line

Preview

item.title: Queueing System Simulation
item.description:
Queueing System Simulation

Poisson arrivals, configurable server pool c, finite total system capacity K, and switchable service-time distributions.

item.title: Warcraft Game Loop
item.description:
Warcraft Game Loop

This graph sketches how Warcraft-style activities connect across progression, economy, social play, and exploration. The main chain is still visible, but intra-phase links, support links, and cost/friction links stay in the model too. Click a node to isolate its outgoing arrows, or click a legend chip to filter by category.

item.title: Regex to NFA/DFA Visualizer
item.description:
Regex to NFA/DFA Visualizer

Parse a small regular-expression subset, build a Thompson NFA, and derive the DFA from it. The graph is deterministic per input, so the same regex always redraws the same way.

item.title: Fenêtres
Maze Solver
item.description:
Maze solver 2.0

Generate a maze with a range of algorithms, then solve it with full-map or local-navigation strategies.

1.0 used static mazes and barely worked. 2.0 generates its own mazes, and has a whole cabinet of generators and solvers.

Ready to generate a 40 x 40 maze until 95% coverage or 5000 ms.
